## Non-Destructive Control Statement

No UI was changed. No navigation was changed. No permissions were changed. No TXQuote, reporting, documents, scoped services, MGA UI, or end-user behavior was changed. No records were seeded, repaired, quarantined, or mutated. No `master_general_agent_id` was assigned. No `master_group_id` was assigned. This document records only the DBA confirmation of B4B-06 and formally presents the Phase 4B approval gate.

## Section 6 — Phase 4B Approval Gate (Formal Presentation)

### What Phase 4B is

Phase 4B is the **final production backfill** of the MGA migration. It will:

1. Stamp `master_general_agent_id` and `master_group_id` on all out-of-batch-scope operational records identified as Phase 4B candidates in the second dry-run (13 P1 records across BenefitCase, CensusVersion, CensusMember, ActivityLog, and Proposal).
2. Evaluate and classify Help/notification entities (P2 — ~8 records identified in second dry-run) for potential MGA scoping.
3. Resolve the indirect quarantine link on Proposal `cda1` (case_id points to quarantined BenefitCase `c19e`) — cannot receive MGA scope until parent BA-15 is resolved.
4. Activate the Phase 3 scoped service layer for live MGA-scoped API calls.
5. Expose the Phase 5 MGA UI (governed by the Phase 5 spec: `docs/MGA_PHASE_5_MASTER_GENERAL_AGENT_PAGE_SPEC.md`).
6. Execute the full Phase 4B test set (25 tests defined in second dry-run report Section 7).

### What Phase 4B requires before execution

| Requirement | Status |
|---|---|
| Explicit owner approval of Phase 4B | ❌ **NOT YET PROVIDED — required** |
| All B4B-01–06 blockers resolved | ✅ MET |
| Second dry-run PASS | ✅ MET |
| Phase 4B test set defined | ✅ MET |
| Rollback plan available | ✅ MET (rollbackPlan.js + 58 markers) |
| No remaining P0 anomalies | ✅ MET |

### What Phase 4B will NOT do without separate approval

- Phase 4B will NOT activate Phase 5 MGA UI automatically — that requires a separate Phase 5 approval gate.
- Phase 4B will NOT release any quarantined records — quarantine release requires individual platform admin approval per MGAQuarantineRecord.
- Phase 4B will NOT resolve the BA-13, BA-14, BA-15, BA-16/17 quarantine decisions — those remain as permanent quarantine until explicitly released.

### Rollback plan for Phase 4B

If Phase 4B execution is approved and must be rolled back:
- 58 rollback markers exist for all RE-01 through RE-08 mutations.
- Phase 4B backfill will generate new rollback markers (one per stamped record) before writing any scope field.
- Rollback reverts `master_general_agent_id` and `master_group_id` to null and `mga_migration_status` to not_migrated.
- Quarantined records are unaffected by Phase 4B rollback (quarantine is independent).

### Phase 4B scope — records confirmed eligible for backfill

| Entity type | Record identifier | Resolvable parent chain | Phase 4B action |
|---|---|---|---|
| BenefitCase | `8002` — Redwood Family Dental (no case number) | cd90 → NBG-MG-001 → NBG ✅ | Stamp NBG scope |
| BenefitCase | `8846` — Pacific Harbor Tech (BC-MO23FYUV) | cd91 → NBG-MG-001 → NBG ✅ | Stamp NBG scope |
| CensusVersion | `5d90` — census-template.csv v1 | via `8002` → NBG ✅ | Stamp NBG scope |
| CensusVersion | `4be9` — census-template.csv v1 | via `8002` → NBG ✅ | Stamp NBG scope |
| CensusMember | 4 members (EMP001, EMP002 × 2 versions) | via CensusVersions → `8002` → NBG ✅ | Stamp NBG scope |
| ActivityLog | `2bf7`, `756c`, `cc16` | via `8002` → NBG ✅ | Stamp NBG scope |
| ActivityLog | `da7c` | via `8846` → NBG ✅ | Stamp NBG scope |
| Proposal | `cda1` | ⚠️ Parent `c19e` QUARANTINED — cannot stamp | Must remain blocked; flag for human review |
| ActivityLog | `a287` | ⚠️ Parent `cfe0` QUARANTINED — cannot stamp | Must remain blocked; flag for human review |
| Help/notification entities | ~8 (HelpSearchLog, HelpAuditLog) | No MGA field present | P2 — evaluate whether MGA scope field backfill is required per Phase 5 design |

**Phase 4B net eligible records for scope stamping: 12** (excluding the 2 blocked-by-quarantined-parent and ~8 P2 help entities pending separate evaluation)

**Phase 4B must not start automatically. This gate requires a return decision.**
